name: RT-qPCR Protocol
nameCn: 实时荧光定量 PCR 流程

notes.en: Reference genes: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA. Analysis: 2^(−ΔΔCt) method. ≥3 technical replicates, ≥3 biological replicates. Primer efficiency should be 90–110%.
notes.zh: 内参基因: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA。分析: 2^(-ΔΔCt) 法。技术重复 ≥3，生物学重复 ≥3。引物效率应在 90–110%。NTC (no template control) 必需。

ref: Bustin et al. (2009) Clin Chem 55:611–622 (MIQE Guidelines); Livak & Schmittgen (2001) Methods 25:402–408

materials.name: qPCR master mix (SYBR Green or TaqMan)
Forward and reverse primers (10 µM each)

usage.en: Quantify gene expression or DNA copy number by real-time quantitative PCR.
usage.zh: 实时定量 PCR 定量基因表达或 DNA 拷贝数。

briefSteps.en: Extract and quantify RNA → treat with DNase I → reverse transcribe 500 ng–2 µg RNA to cDNA → dilute cDNA 1:5–1:20 → set up 20 µL SYBR Green qPCR reactions in triplicate → run 95°C/60°C cycling → analyze melt curve and calculate expression by 2^(−ΔΔCt).
briefSteps.zh: 提取并定量 RNA → DNase I 处理 → 反转录 500 ng–2 µg RNA 至 cDNA → cDNA 1:5–1:20 稀释 → 三孔设置 20 µL SYBR Green qPCR 反应 → 运行 95°C/60°C 循环 → 分析溶解曲线并用 2^(-ΔΔCt) 法计算表达量。

detailedSteps.en: Extract total RNA using TRIzol or a silica-column kit. Quantify by NanoDrop: A260/280 ratio should be ~2.0. A260/230 ratio should be >1.8. Acceptable RNA concentration: ≥50 ng/µL.
detailedSteps.zh: 使用 TRIzol 或硅胶柱试剂盒提取总 RNA。NanoDrop 定量：A260/280 应约为 2.0，A260/230 应 >1.8，可接受 RNA 浓度 ≥50 ng/µL。

detailedSteps.en: Optional: treat RNA with DNase I (1 U per µg RNA, 37°C 30 min, then inactivate at 75°C 10 min with EDTA) to eliminate genomic DNA contamination.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：用 DNase I（每微克 RNA 加 1 U，37°C 30 min，加 EDTA 后 75°C 10 min 灭活）处理 RNA，去除基因组 DNA 污染。

detailedSteps.en: Set up reverse transcription: use 500 ng–2 µg RNA with a combination of oligo-dT (for mRNA) and random hexamers. Follow manufacturer's protocol (e.g., SuperScript IV, 55°C 10 min; M-MLV, 42°C 50 min). Final volume: 20 µL.
detailedSteps.zh: 配制反转录反应：使用 500 ng–2 µg RNA，搭配 oligo-dT（针对 mRNA）和随机六聚体引物。按厂家说明操作（如 SuperScript IV：55°C 10 min；M-MLV：42°C 50 min）。终体积 20 µL。

detailedSteps.en: Dilute cDNA 1:5 to 1:20 with nuclease-free water. For highly expressed genes use 1:20; for low-abundance transcripts use 1:5. Store diluted cDNA at −20°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 用无核酸酶水将 cDNA 稀释 1:5 至 1:20。高表达基因用 1:20，低丰度转录本用 1:5。稀释后的 cDNA 存于 −20°C。

detailedSteps.en: Set up 20 µL qPCR reactions in triplicate: 10 µL 2× SYBR Green Master Mix, 0.4 µL forward primer (10 µM, 200 nM final), 0.4 µL reverse primer (10 µM, 200 nM final), 2 µL cDNA, 7.2 µL nuclease-free water. Include NTC (water instead of cDNA) and reference gene wells.
detailedSteps.zh: 三孔设置 20 µL qPCR 反应：10 µL 2× SYBR Green Master Mix、0.4 µL 正向引物（10 µM，终浓度 200 nM）、0.4 µL 反向引物（10 µM，终浓度 200 nM）、2 µL cDNA、7.2 µL 无核酸酶水。同时设无模板对照（NTC）和内参基因孔。

detailedSteps.en: Seal the plate with optical adhesive film. Centrifuge briefly at 1,000×g for 1 min to eliminate bubbles.
detailedSteps.zh: 用光学封膜密封孔板。短暂 1,000×g 离心 1 min 消除气泡。

detailedSteps.en: Run qPCR program: polymerase activation at 95°C for 10 min, then 40 cycles of denaturation 95°C for 15 s and annealing/extension at 60°C for 60 s.
detailedSteps.zh: 运行 qPCR 程序：酶激活 95°C 10 min，然后 40 个循环：变性 95°C 15 s，退火/延伸 60°C 60 s。

detailedSteps.en: Run melt curve analysis (65–95°C, 0.5°C increments) after cycling. A single sharp peak confirms amplification specificity; multiple peaks or broad peaks indicate non-specific products.
detailedSteps.zh: 循环结束后进行溶解曲线分析（65–95°C，每步 0.5°C）。单一尖锐峰确认扩增特异性；多峰或宽峰提示非特异扩增。

detailedSteps.en: Analyze Ct values: ΔCt = Ct(gene of interest) − Ct(reference gene). ΔΔCt = ΔCt(treated) − ΔCt(control). Relative expression = 2^(−ΔΔCt). Report mean ± SD from ≥3 biological replicates.
detailedSteps.zh: 分析 Ct 值：ΔCt = Ct（目的基因）− Ct（内参基因）；ΔΔCt = ΔCt（处理组）− ΔCt（对照组）；相对表达量 = 2^(-ΔΔCt)。报告 ≥3 个生物学重复的均值 ± SD。

note.en: cDNA can be stored at −20°C for up to 6 months before proceeding to qPCR setup.
note.zh: cDNA 可在 −20°C 保存最多 6 个月，随后再进行 qPCR 配板。

note.en: Sealed qPCR plate can be stored at 4°C in the dark for up to 2 hours before running.
note.zh: 封好的 qPCR 板可在 4°C 避光保存最多 2 小时后再上机运行。
